# hyliquid

> Private orderbook exchange on Hyli. Trade tokens with limit/market orders.

Use `hyli-wallet` to create wallets and sign transactions for hyliquid.

## Quick start

```bash
# 1. Create a wallet with orderbook whitelisted
hyli-wallet register alice vip --contracts orderbook

# 2. Fund it
hyli-wallet fund 1000 oranj alice

# 3. Deposit into hyliquid
curl -X POST http://localhost:9002/deposit \
  -H "x-identity: alice@wallet" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"symbol":"oranj","amount":500}'

# 4. Register session key with hyliquid
PUBKEY=$(hyli-wallet pubkey alice --uncompressed)
curl -X POST http://localhost:9002/add_session_key \
  -H "x-identity: alice@wallet" \
  -H "x-public-key: $PUBKEY"

# 5. Place an order
NONCE=$(curl -s http://localhost:9002/nonce -H "x-identity: alice@wallet")
SIG=$(hyli-wallet sign "alice@wallet:${NONCE}:create_order:order1" alice --sha3)
curl -X POST http://localhost:9002/create_order \
  -H "x-identity: alice@wallet" \
  -H "x-public-key: $PUBKEY" \
  -H "x-signature: $SIG" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"order_id":"order1","order_type":"limit","order_side":"bid","price":100,"pair":["oranj","hyllar"],"quantity":50}'
```

## API (write — port 9002)

| Method | Path | Auth | Purpose |
|--------|------|------|---------|
| POST | /deposit | identity | Deposit tokens |
| POST | /add_session_key | identity + pubkey | Register signing key |
| POST | /create_order | identity + pubkey + signature | Place order |
| POST | /cancel_order | identity + pubkey + signature | Cancel order |
| POST | /withdraw | identity + pubkey + signature | Withdraw tokens |
| GET | /nonce | identity | Get current nonce |

## API (read — port 3000)

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /api/book/:base/:quote | Order book depth |
| GET | /api/info | Market info, instruments |
| GET | /api/user/balances | User balances (needs x-identity) |
| GET | /api/user/orders | User orders (needs x-identity) |
| GET | /api/user/trades | User trades (needs x-identity) |

## Signing format (sha3-256)

```
create_order:  {identity}:{nonce}:create_order:{order_id}
cancel_order:  {identity}:{nonce}:cancel:{order_id}
withdraw:      {identity}:{nonce}:withdraw:{symbol}:{amount}
```

Sign with: `hyli-wallet sign "<message>" <wallet> --sha3`
Public key: `hyli-wallet pubkey <wallet> --uncompressed`

For full docs, see llms-full.txt.
